hook.text: No users are online at 4 AM. Is the site working? You won't know unless you check.

buildup.text: Synthetic monitoring runs automated tests against your service at regular intervals.

discovery.text: Tests check critical paths: login, homepage, checkout. If any fail, alert immediately.

twist.text: Run tests from multiple regions. Your service might work in US-East but fail in Europe.

climax.text: Tools like Pingdom, Checkly, and Datadog Synthetics make this easy to set up.

punchline.text: Test like a user, even when no users are around.

quiz.question: What is synthetic monitoring?
options: Automated tests that simulate user actions at regular intervals
Monitoring only during peak traffic hours
Manual testing performed by QA teams
